findings.claim: From the Government & Regulatory view, Should Boston implement congestion pricing downtown primarily affects legal authority.
assumptions: Local conditions resemble those in source PLACEHOLDER-GOV.
limitations: Limited city-specific data in the curated corpus.

likely_position: Government & Regulatory is cautiously supportive if legal authority concerns are addressed.
data_gaps: Need recent Boston, MA data on legal authority
handoff_summary: Government & Regulatory: cautiously supportive; key concern = enforceability; 3 sources cited.
